text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While walking around town, I bump<n>into Rice
Shower and her friends, and<n>we strike up a
conversation.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
We're on our way to buy some stuff<n>we need to
make preserved flowers!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The flowers are blooming so<n>beautifully right now,
I can't wait to<n>preserve them!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! Look over there! There's a<n>whole group of
pretty people!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You're right. They all look so fancy in<n>their
kimonos and dresses... Maybe<n>it's a wedding?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A wedding! Aww, I'd love to see the<n>ceremony!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
And how do you celebrate the joy of<n>the married
couple? With a shower of<n>rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Oh, Rob Roy!

text_block_list.name: Wedding Hall Equipe
text_block_list.text: What?! The bouquet's not coming?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We hear the panicked voices of the<n>wedding hall
staff. It sounds like<n>there's been a problem with
the<n>bouquet delivery, and they can't<n>organize a
replacement.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: You can't have a wedding without<n>any flowers...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, it's all my fault... My presence<n>has ruined
the wedding!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, flowers, huh? They're gonna<n>need a whole
lot of them, right?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it's a bouquet, so they'd need<n>quite a lot. I
don't know how you<n>could find so many in such a
short<n>amount of time, though.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I can get the flowers they need!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Rice! Where are you going?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, e-excuse me! Please take these<n>flowers!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower hands the staff member<n>at the
wedding hall a huge armful of<n>flowers.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Rice, were those flowers...
choice_data_list:
Weren't those the flowers you were going to
preserve?

Weren't those the flowers you were going to
preserve?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It's okay! Please take them! I don't<n>like the idea
of a wedding being<n>cursed with bad luck!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Nothing would make me happier than<n>my flowers
bringing joy to others!

text_block_list.name: Wedding Hall Equipe
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so very much... Now we<n>can hold the
wedding as planned!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower and the others are<n>invited to the
wedding as a token of<n>gratitude for saving the
day, and it<n>goes off without a hitch.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: It's time for the bouquet toss!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh gosh! I'm getting all nervous now!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The joy-filled bouquet is tossed, and<n>as it soars
through the air...

text_block_list.name: Crow
text_block_list.text: Caw, caw! CHOMP!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow! A crow caught the bouquet!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what should we do?! It's my<n>fault for being
here!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yep, this one's on you, Rice! Look up<n>at the sky!
It's so pretty!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Flowers rain from the sky. With the<n>bouquet
loosening in the crow's<n>mouth, the petals shower
down...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
A petal shower... This is so perfect for<n>a day like
today.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yay! Happiness for everyone!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad I managed to put a smile<n>on
everyone's faces in the end!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I really, truly hope everyone finds<n>lasting
happiness.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
...And so the joyous flowers continue<n>to bring
smiles to all. A happy ending<n>indeed.
